title: DEEPCRAFT™ Ready Model for Siren Detection
description: detects the sound of emergency vehicle sirens in the vicinity of a microphone
long_description: The DEEPCRAFT™ Ready Model for Siren Detection is a production-ready Edge AI model that detects the sound of emergency vehicle sirens in the vicinity of a microphone.
